saft.title: SAF-T
saft.subtitle: Standard Audit File for Tax — generate for submission to the revenue agency.
saft.readyYes: ✓ Company data is ready for SAF-T
content: Header — company data, period and software

obligations.title: What is SAF-T
obligations.text: SAF-T (Standard Audit File for Tax) is a standardized XML file with a structure defined by the revenue agency, containing accounting data, documents, counterparties, taxes and assets. It gives the revenue administration a complete, uniform picture for audit.

obligations.title: Who is obliged
obligations.text: The obligation is introduced in stages — first for large enterprises, then for medium and small, and finally for micro-enterprises. Check which group your company belongs to and the date from which the obligation applies.

obligations.title: Frequency
obligations.text: Monthly — accounting data and purchase/sales data; annually — fixed asset data; on demand — stock levels. The module generates all three types.

obligations.title: Deadlines
obligations.text: Monthly files are submitted by the statutory deadline after the end of the respective month. The annual file — together with the annual closing. Follow the official deadlines of the revenue agency.

saft.disclaimer: The file is generated per the SAF-T structure for Bulgaria (OECD SAF-T 2.0 / revenue agency). Before submission, check compliance against the current official XSD schema for your reporting period.

panel.title: Generate SAF-T file
panel.subtitle: Choose type and period. The file is downloaded in XML format, ready for submission to the revenue agency.
panel.notReady: Fill in the missing company data above to generate a valid SAF-T file.
